headline: Super vs ChatGPT — personal AI agents for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs ChatGPT. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs ChatGPT

summary: ChatGPT is a world‑class general AI assistant that’s rapidly evolving toward agents, scheduled tasks, and orchestration across tools. Super is built specifically for people who want a personal AI agent that actually operates a computer — and reuses a computer-use cache so repeated workflows get faster and cheaper over time. This page fairly explains what ChatGPT is great at, what it’s not optimized for, and why Super is the sharper alternative for durable computer‑use work.
